certificationBasis.note: The older T-039 bridge artifact is retained only as historical context and is no longer the active certification basis. The current desktop queue production-ready posture is carried by the later hardening and launcher-alignment passes in T-048 and T-049, together with the live repo-level productionReady flag.
certificationBasis.certificationNote: Cold lane certification remains 4 of 4. The active queue lane now relies on the hardened helper and canonical launcher surfaces validated in T-048 and T-049 rather than the older bridge-only artifact.
